Grey Gold Induction 10 Pc Cookware Set Non Stick Frying Pan Saucepan Cooking Pot

Item Description

Gr8 Home Grey Gold 10 Piece Induction Non Stick Aluminium Kitchen Cookware Set Casserole Cooking Pot Frying Pan Saucepan With Glass Lids

Key Product Features

Lid: Glass lids

Base: Induction Steel Disc Base

Interior: Grey Ceramic Non Stick Coating

PFAS, PTFE, PFOA FREE

Exterior: Grey Heat Resistant Painting

Parts: Gold Stainless Steel Oven Safe Handle/ Knob

Material: Pressed Aluminium

Durable Aluminium Body

Item Sizes:

26*4.5 cm Fry Pan

30*5 cm Fry Pan

18*8 cm Saucepan with lid

20*8.6 cm Saucepan with lid

24*6.5 cm Saucepan with lid

24*11 cm Casserole with lid

Suitable for: Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen, Induction

Product Description

Upgrade your kitchen with this premium 10-piece cookware set, designed for everyday cooking with professional-level performance. Crafted for durability and style, this versatile collection includes all the essential pots and pans to prepare anything from quick weeknight meals to gourmet dishes.

Product Details

Product Code: EHRW-S003

Sku No: 2017202

Ean: 5057102017202

Package Dimensions: 55 x 35 x 18cm Approx

Product Weight Inc Packaging: 5.7kg Approx

Please Note: Colour May Slightly Vary From The Image Shown Although The Concept Is The Same

We are a family run business with over 30 years experience in the trade. We began selling on eBay at the end of 2008 and have built an excellent portfolio of products we are always adding new lines and sourcing great deals, we can offer incredible prices due to our excellent trading partners locally and abroad. With our experience we ensure all our products are of the best quality and genuine merchandise.

PayPal is the only method of payment accepted from all buyers, you do not need a PayPal account to pay via PayPal you can use any debit or credit card and pay direct into PayPal. Sorry no other payment form is accepted

We will ship your goods within 24 hours of receiving cleared payment monday-Friday, Purchases made on Friday thru to Sunday will be sent on Monday. We print invoices from 8am (7am from October-December) so purchases after that time will be sent 24 hours later. We use Royal Mail, The DX secure, Fed Ex, UPS, UK Mail, DPD. We will only ship to the address on the invoice unfortunatly we cannot ship to any other address. For International shipments, we use UPS, Fed Ex, DPD, if your country is not listed please ask us for a quote some countries we cannot ship to, we require a valid phone number for all international orders

After choosing Buy it Now, please pay for pay for your item with 3 days, or ebay will open a unpaid item case. We have our eBay account set up so eBay opens cases on our behalf and this will be done after 3 days. We will offer shipping discount on multiple purchases, some items already offer a discount on postage please see postage and payments tab on the listing page for rates. Please see our returns policy at the bottom of the page for any issues about returning a product. Please leave me positive feedback when you are 100% satisfied with your purchase and our service, if for any reason you feel negative feedback is necessary please contact us so we can resolve the issue before leaving negative feedback.

We will accept returns on all our products that are faulty, please initially send us a message through eBay. Then we will ask you to send the item back. So we can check it and then we will send you a brand new one absolutely free refund your postage through PayPal. PLEASE PUT EBAY USER ID IN PACKAGE ALONG WITH A NOTE. FOR UNWANTED GOODS, ITEMS MUST BE RETURNED IN RESELLABLE CONDITION AT THE BUYERS COST WE WILL THEN ONLY REFUND ITEM COST NOT POSTAGE PAID.

product.product_name: 8 PCS Kitchen Cookware Set Non-Stick Granite Pots and Sauce Pans Set Induction
product.description: The 8 PCS Kitchen Cookware set is a versatile addition to any kitchen, featuring a sleek design and innovative non-stick granite coating for easy cooking and cleaning. This eight-piece set includes round pots and pans with a removable handle, making it suitable for use on induction hobs. The black colour adds a touch of style to your cooking space, while the non-stick surface ensures that your food is effortlessly released during cooking. Perfect for creating delicious meals with ease, this pan set from Kitchen is a must-have for any home cook.
product.category: Home & Garden > Cooking, Dining & Barware > Cookware > Pots & Pans
